raw_consumer_statement: I asked American Express twice, on XX/XX/year> and XX/XX/year>, to open and re-open a dispute for a charge of {$360.00} to XXXX for wrongful charge for checked luggage. XXXX had told me the luggage fee is waived due to my XXXX status but then charged me almost 5 times the usual charge for checked luggage ( ~ {$75.00} ).
